headline: Quest Diagnostics to Release First Quarter Financial Results on April 21, 2026
summary: Quest Diagnostics Incorporated (NYSE: DGX), a leader in diagnostic information services, announced today that it will report first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, before the market opens. It will hold its quarterly conference call to discuss the results beginning at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on that day.

headline: How Is Quest Diagnostics’ Stock Performance Compared to Other Healthcare Stocks?
summary: Quest Diagnostics has outpaced its healthcare peers over the past year, and analysts are maintaining a moderately positive outlook on its future performance.
